rules: No game data or runtime server code modified.
Only the logs named by the request were read for extraction.
Names are null when the allowed logs do not expose display names.
Quest/reward associations are only same-folder temporal associations and are marked uncertain unless same-timestamp.

limitations: inventory-updates.csv shows inventory/container/corpse item state but does not by itself prove an item was gained or removed.
Corpse inventory rows are treated as loot-window observations, not confirmed player gains.
Container rows are possible item-gain/container-state evidence and remain uncertain.
XP/Cash values are stat snapshots and changes; first observed values are baselines, not rewards.
